title: ALLEY
blurb: Mott and Mulberry. Sanitation hasn't picked up since the eighth. Whatever's been chewing through the bags has friends now.
briefing: The garbage is stacked to the second-floor windows. Something inside it has been reproducing. You meet your first roach — not the kitchen kind; the kind you can hear from twenty feet. Bring the long gun. Keep moving.
epigraph: "A matchbook from the Hotel Carter, half-burnt. You don't open it."
